project.name: WageShield
project.description: Confidential wage-theft claims on Fhenix CoFHE — a Privara-native plugin (resolver + underwriter policy + claim contract) that lets workers file encrypted claims without disclosing identity, hours, rate, or owed amount.

stack.issuer: Express + @noble/curves secp256k1 EIP-712 signer (mock timeclock VC)
